The 2024 Paris Olympics opening ceremony takes place today despite the sabotage of the high-speed TGV rail network, and crypto’s favorite Olympics coinThe Meme Games ($MGMES)is soaring past $250,000.

In a matter of days, Olympic Games-themed crypto token $MGMES has surged to a raise total of $267,000. There are only five days to go before the presale moves on to its next price point.

An indication of the popularity of investing around the Olympics theme is Solympics, a Solana-based meme coin whose price is up 34% today, according todata compiled by CoinMarketCap. The Meme Games, by contrast, promises to outperform Solympics by providing an unfussy, easy-to-play gaming format with enticing rewards.

The momentum for the world’s biggest sporting event continues to grow despite the sabotage attack on the French train network’s infrastructure, which has caused massive delays for an estimated 800,000 passengers, including Olympic spectators.

Of course, the sabotage did not affect the digitally based Web3 Meme Games token $MGMES. Indeed, its purchase-and-play dynamics are already popular with crypto watchers.

The $MGMES token can be bought for a one-time cheap price of $0.0091. However, in five days’ time, the price increases to $0.00915 as the presale enters its fourth stage out of a total of 10. Thirty-eight percent of the total token supply of 2,024,000,000 has been allocated to the presale.

Select one of the five biggest original crypto meme characters – Dogecoin ($DOGE), Pepe ($PEPE), DogWifHat ($WIF), Brett ($BRETT) and Turbo ($TURBO) – and see them run the 169m sprint, where the character has a 20% chance of winning a 25% bonus on their purchase.

$MGMES has arguably become crypto’s official meme coin of the 2024 Paris Olympics as its popularity and visibility go from strength to strength.

The Meme Gamespresale runs concurrently with the Olympics, concluding on September 8th to coincide with the Paralympics closing ceremony. On September 10th, the token will be listed on decentralized exchanges – the price is expected to rocket.

Unlike Solympics, The Meme Games enables its players to access five topline meme coins as part of the core feature set of its Web3 game.

Gaming remains one of the hottest sectors in crypto, as does the meme coin category, so $MGMES has a lot going for it.

Crypto traders are drawn to $MGMES by its simple yet attractive gaming and rewards model and its savvy marketing messaging, which has hit gold as the standout coin of the Paris Olympics.

Crypto and tech media are encouragingly optimistic about the potential of The Meme Games.Coinspeaker,Watcher Guru,CryptoPotato,The Tech Report, andReadWriteare just some of the outlets covering the new coin.

The Crypto Gains YouTube channel is urging its 135,000 subscribers “to get in early” on $MGMES to avoid disappointment:



Moreover, all of the meme coins in The Meme Games portfolio could pump much higher from here. Turbo, for example, is tipped by onepopular crypto expert for 1,000x gains.

Alongside the bonuses bonanza, presale participants can also look forward to locking in token rewards from staking to secure a passive income.

Currently, stakers can earn 911% per annum return, although the annual percentage yield varies depending on the number of stakers – another reason to expedite a decision on buying decision-making.

$MGMES is an ERC-20 token. Accordingly, staking is available on the Ethereum blockchain. These $MGMES rewards tokens are emitted at a rate of 38.5 per ETH block and will be disbursed over a two-year period.

Regarding smart contract security, The Meme Games has been fully audited bySolidProofandCoinsult.

Join up online with 18,000 followers on The Meme Games’X/Twitteraccount. There’s also aTelegramgroup to get involved with, so all the latest news is at your fingertips.

With anOlympics audience of over one billionexpected to tune in on TV and online, The Meme Games is one of the best return-on-investment opportunities in crypto right now.

Contribute to the presale today atThe Meme Games website.
